_comment: Custom tolerance overrides. Values in HU unless noted.
_reference: ACR CT Accreditation Program + AAPM TG-233

noise.description: Image noise SD in uniform water phantom ROI. ACR baseline +/-10 HU.

uniformity_deviation.description: Max absolute difference between centre and peripheral ROI means.

hu_water.description: HU accuracy for water insert. Expected 0 HU. ACR: within +/-7 HU.

hu_air.description: HU accuracy for air. Expected -1000 HU.

slice_thickness.description: Slice thickness deviation from nominal. ACR: +/-1 mm for slices >=3mm.

cnr.description: Contrast-to-noise ratio. Baseline-dependent -- set from your scanner.
